paragraphs.source: On the outskirts of the shuffle box, there are MPO connectors, which connect fibers housed within the shuffle box to an external port. Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.

Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: On the outskirts of the shuffle box, there are MPO connectors, which connect fibers housed within the shuffle box to an external port. Fiber Optic MPO cables can then plug into this port to connect the switch with other distant switches or to distant NICs. The manufacturing process of MPO connectors primarily involves injection molding, vacuum adhesive filling, and fiber threading of the MT ferrules inside the unit. For the X-800 Q3450 CPO switch, there are 144 MPO connectors needed.

pro.text: 在洗牌盒外围设有MPO连接器，用于将盒内光纤连至外部端口。随后可将光纤MPO线缆插入该端口，把交换机与其他远端交换机或远端网卡（NIC）连接起来。MPO连接器的主要制造工艺包括注塑成型、真空灌胶以及MT插芯的光纤穿入。对于X-800 Q3450共封装光学（CPO）交换机，共需使用144个MPO连接器。

issues.description: 术语'光纤洗牌盒'与术语表及上下文不一致
翻译腔明显，使用'从而'和过长从句
产品型号翻译错误且术语不规范
句子结构可更流畅，'真空灌胶'和'光纤穿芯'可更地道

paragraphs.source: There are multiple players that can produce MPO connectors, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S Communications (China), Senko (Japan), Broadex (China), and Optec (China). They also need to work with the fiber network contract manufacturers (such as Corning) to supply their components into the overall network designs.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: There are multiple players that can produce MPO connectors, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S Communications (China), Senko (Japan), Broadex (China), and Optec (China). They also need to work with the fiber network contract manufacturers (such as Corning) to supply their components into the overall network designs.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: There are multiple players that can produce MPO connectors, including US Conec (U.S.), T&S Communications (China), Senko (Japan), Broadex (China), and Optec (China). They also need to work with the fiber network contract manufacturers (such as Corning) to supply their components into the overall network designs.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

能够生产MPO连接器的厂商有多家，包括US Conec（美国）、T&S Communications（中国）、Senko（日本）、Broadex（中国）和Optec（中国）。这些厂商还需与光纤网络合同制造商（如康宁）合作，将其组件融入整体网络设计。
